calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 plasticity crystallization necessity retest with MECH-341 substrate
items.note: Retest of INV-074 after MECH-341 (E3 score diversity preservation) implementation and retune (2026-05-27/2026-05-30). Tests whether plasticity crystallization at Phase 3 is NECESSARY for diversity persistence. ARM_0 (control): diversity mechanisms (MECH-313, MECH-260, MECH-341, gated_policy) but NO crystallization -> should show collapse. ARM_1 (test): same mechanisms PLUS crystallization_at_phase3=TRUE -> should preserve diversity. PASS if ARM_1 preserves diversity (+0.10 entropy advantage) AND ARM_0 shows collapse (-0.10 from phase2 to phase3) AND both show diversity at Phase 2 (>0.4 entropy). Supersedes V3-EXQ-610 which was killed by SIGTERM after 13.25h due to underestimated runtime (180min vs actual 800min). Substrate dependencies: MECH-341 (IMPLEMENTED 2026-05-27, retuned 2026-05-30), ARC-062 gated_policy (IMPLEMENTED 2026-05-09), MECH-313 noise_floor (IMPLEMENTED 2026-05-10), MECH-260 dACC (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19), MECH-334 crystallization (IMPLEMENTED). Smoke test PASS 2026-05-30 (dry-run seed 42). Re-queued 2026-05-30T04:07Z via IGW-20260530-038 auto-spawn for pending_retest_after_substrate=true on INV-074.
